meaning: adj.陆路的,经过陆地的,陆上的adv.陆上,通过陆路
examples: He made a journey to the Western regions and opened an overland route connecting the East and the West.
For the majority of lakes, certainly those surrounded by forests, input from overland flow is too small to have a noticeable effect.
Even so, travelling overland was the most awe-inspiring way to truly understand the immensity of our wonderful planet.
To counter the uninvited overture, Overland implemented a poison-pill plan a week after Advanced Digital's announcement.
